## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them. Explain what problem this pull request solves and how it addresses it.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — A new feature
- [ ] fix — A bug fix
- [ ] chore — Maintenance, tooling, dependencies
- [ ] docs — Documentation changes
- [ ] refactor — Code refactoring
- [ ] test — Adding or updating tests

## Checklist

- [ ] The code compiles without errors (`bun run typecheck`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`bun test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`bun run lint`)
- [ ] Format check passes (`bun run format:check`)
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated for the changes
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if the public API changed)

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue)
